issues.sample: I WAS DRIVING DOWN THE HIGHWAY AND NOTICED MY CAR DID NOT WANT TO PULL WHEN I SPED UP. A FEW MORE MILES DOWN THE ROAD I NOTICED SMOKE COMING FROM MY TAIL PIPE AND THE MY AIR VENTS. SO I PULLED OVER, GOT OUT, AND WALKED AROUND TO THE FRONT OF THE CAR AND NOTICED WHAT LOOKED LIKE O

TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2015 JAGUAR XF. THE CONTACT STATED THAT THE GEARS FAILED TO SHIFT INTO DRIVE AND REVERSE SEVERAL TIMES WITHOUT WARNING. IN ADDITION, THE REAR TRUNK ELECTRONIC FUNCTION FAILED TO WORK PROPERLY WHEN ATTEMPTING TO OPEN THE TRUNK. THE VEHICLE WAS TAKEN TO TWO D

TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2015 JAGURA XF. THE CONTACT STATED THAT THE ENGINE STALLED WHILE DRIVING. THE VEHICLE WAS TAKEN SEVERAL TIMES TO THE DEALER FOR REPAIR. THE DEALER PERFORMED A DIAGNOSTIC TEST, WHICH LOCATED A FAILURE CODE AT THE FUEL SYSTEM. THE LOW PRESSURE FUEL PUMP WAS R

TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2015 JAGUAR XF. THE CONTACT STATED THAT WHILE DRIVING AND COMING TO A STOP, THE BRAKE PEDAL WAS DEPRESSED AND THE VEHICLE VEERED TO THE LEFT INDEPENDENTLY. THE VEHICLE WAS TAKEN TO THE DEALER WHERE THE TECHNICIAN WAS UNABLE TO DETERMINE THE FAILURE. THE MAN

TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2015 JAGUAR XF. THE CONTACT STATED THAT WHILE DRIVING AND COMING TO A STOP, THE BRAKE PEDAL WAS DEPRESSED AND THE VEHICLE VEERED TO THE LEFT INDEPENDENTLY. THE VEHICLE WAS TAKEN TO THE DEALER WHERE THE TECHNICIAN WAS UNABLE TO DETERMINE THE FAILURE. THE MAN

narrative.headline: What 2015 Jaguar Xf owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 19 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (26% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.

issues.sample: I WAS DRIVING DOWN THE HIGHWAY AND NOTICED MY CAR DID NOT WANT TO PULL WHEN I SPED UP. A FEW MORE MILES DOWN THE ROAD I NOTICED SMOKE COMING FROM MY TAIL PIPE AND THE MY AIR VENTS. SO I PULLED OVER, GOT OUT, AND WALKED AROUND TO THE FRONT OF THE CAR AND NOTICED WHAT LOOKED LIKE O
